prompt:
A pack of four 3D-printed PLA cable clips arranged neatly on a desk edge, each clip snapping over the surface and guiding a USB-style cable into a tidy channel. The clips have a clean, slightly matte printed finish with visible layer lines, and a few cables (power and data) are routed through them to show their purpose clearly.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a clean near-future maker desk aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic plastic texture and print layers, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the clips as the focal subject with a simple, uncluttered background.
